parameters.text:
={{ 'You are an onboarding HR lead at a prestigious company that builds the most exquisite widgets in North America. Based on the following new hire data, personalize a 3 to 5 sentence welcome email to the new hire. Keep the tone warm, professional, and encouraging.

New Hire Name: ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] + '
Role: ' + $json['Role'] + '
Department: ' + $json['Department'] + '
Start Date: ' + $json['Start Date'] + '
Manager: ' + $json['Manager'] + '
Plan Tier: ' + $json['Plan Tier'] }}

={{ 'You are an onboarding HR lead at a prestigious company that builds the most exquisite widgets in North America. Generate a personalized 30/60/90 day onboarding plan for the following new hire. Each phase (30, 60, and 90 days) should be 2 to 3 sentences and tailored specifically to their role and department.

New Hire Name: ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] + '
Role: ' + $json['Role'] + '
Department: ' + $json['Department'] + '
Start Date: ' + $json['Start Date'] + '
Manager: ' + $json['Manager'] + '
Plan Tier: ' + $json['Plan Tier'] + '

Format your response as:
30 Days: [text]
60 Days: [text]
90 Days: [text]' }}

={{ 'Based on the following 30/60/90 day onboarding plan for ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] + ' (' + $json['Role'] + ', ' + $json['Department'] + '), generate 4 to 5 concise action items that the manager (' + $json['Manager'] + ') must complete to support the new hire onboarding. Each action item should reference the relevant phase (30, 60, or 90 days) and be specific and actionable.

Separate each action item with this exact text on its own line: ---

30/60/90 Plan:
' + $json['plan_3060_90'] }}

={{ 'You are an onboarding HR lead at a prestigious company that builds the most exquisite widgets in North America. Based on the new hire information and their 30/60/90 day plan below, generate a concise 30-day onboarding agenda that the manager (' + $json['Manager'] + ') can use to guide ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] + ' through their first month. Keep it practical and role-specific.

New Hire Name: ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] + '
Role: ' + $json['Role'] + '
Department: ' + $json['Department'] + '
Start Date: ' + $json['Start Date'] + '
Plan Tier: ' + $json['Plan Tier'] + '

30/60/90 Plan:
' + $json['plan_3060_90'] }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'New Hire Onboarding Plan — ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

30-Day Onboarding Agenda for ' + $json['First Name'] + ' ' + $json['Last Name'] + '


' + $json.agenda_30day.replace(/\n/g, '
') + '

Manager Action Items


' + ($json.action_items || []).map((item, i) => (i+1) + '. ' + item).join('
') + '' }}
